title: The Lab Holds Giant Children
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Chopper, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is the lab holds giant children.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You sure seem popular with the boys.

dialogue.text: What did they mean about "frozen people"?

summary: The Lab Holds Giant Children. This part moves the Straw Hats from Fish-Man Island into the New World and begins the mystery of Punk Hazard.
